title: Trigonometry, Vectors, and Periodic Systems · Model Repair Bay
summary: Plan bearings, slopes, cyclic demand, and resultant forces. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a navigation and periodic-demand model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use radians and the unit circle to define trigonometric functions and periodicity.
Apply right-triangle ratios with diagrams, units, and angle conditions.
Choose laws of sines or cosines and detect ambiguous cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Recalculate the repaired case
steps.instruction: Perpendicular components are 9 units and 12 units. Calculate the resultant magnitude.
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Use √(9² + 12²) and check that the result exceeds either component.

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Predict the sign and approximate magnitude. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then compare it with that prediction.

hints: Use √(9² + 12²) and check that the result exceeds either component.
Keep full working precision and round only the final reported value.
The accepted result is within 0.001 of the exact value and includes units.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Sinusoidal Fit applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Fit amplitude, period, phase, and midline to a periodic dataset.
